treatments.name: Surface Cleaning
treatments.description: Dry surface cleaning to remove dust and loose particulates.

treatments.name: Page Repair (Tear)
treatments.description: Mend page tears with Japanese tissue and wheat starch paste.

treatments.name: Cover/Spine Strengthening
treatments.description: Reinforce weakened hinges or spine linings.

treatments.name: Re-binding
treatments.description: Disbind and re-sew or re-case a damaged volume.

treatments.name: Deacidification
treatments.description: Neutralize acidity using approved deacidification process.

treatments.name: Mold Mitigation
treatments.description: Isolate, clean, and stabilize mold-affected items.
